title: Rahul Gupta - Analyst at Dark Alpha Capital | Expert in Website Development and Compliance | Dark Alpha Capital
content:
# Rahul Gupta

Analyst

[SET AN APPOINTMENT](https://calendly.com/darkalphacapital)

# About Rahul Gupta

Rahul is an analyst at Dark Alpha Capital, an investment firm focused on acquiring private companies across the lower middle market having $3,000,000 plus of EBITDA. Rahul’s responsibilities include website development and maintenance, content management, security and compliance, and performance management.

Prior to joining Dark Alpha, Rahul worked as a full time Software Engineer.

Rahul received a Computer Science Degree from PCTE Group of Institutes, Ludhiana.
